mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_group (id, name, description, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT g.* FROM study_group g JOIN study_member m ON g.id = m.study_id WHERE m.user_email = #{userEmail}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_member (id, study_id, user_email, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{userEmail}, #{role}, #{joinedAt})
INSERT INTO study_invite (id, study_id, inviter_email, invitee_email, status, invited_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{inviterEmail}, #{inviteeEmail}, #{status}, #{invitedAt})
INSERT INTO shared_essay (id, study_id, user_email, workspace_id, version_id, shared_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{userEmail}, #{workspaceId}, #{versionId}, #{sharedAt})
INSERT INTO essay_feedback (id, shared_essay_id, author_email, content, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{sharedEssayId}, #{authorEmail}, #{content}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO shared_job (id, study_id, recommender_email, company_name, position_title, deadline_label, source_url, recommended_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{studyId}, #{recommenderEmail}, #{companyName}, #{positionTitle}, #{deadlineLabel}, #{sourceUrl}, #{recommendedAt})
